texto: Humans are a terrestrial species biased toward attributing the forces we see around us to familiar forces on land. But the more we look, the more we learn that everything arises from the sea and everything falls away to the sea, and the deep blue home is home to every one of us, whether we are beings of water, air, rock, ice, or soil.
explicacao: Citação de Julia Whitty sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Humans are a terrestrial species biased toward attributing the forces we see around us to familia…” articula sabedoria, naturalism, nature em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como nature e nature-quotes.
